info.title: SimpleInvokeAgent
info.description: A minimal agent that handles POST /invoke with optional SSE streaming. Pass Content-Type: text/event-stream to receive a streaming SSE response; any other Content-Type returns a single JSON object.

post.description: Send a message to the agent. Set Content-Type to 'text/event-stream' for an SSE streaming response, or 'application/json' for a single JSON response.

200.description: Successful response. Returns a JSON object when Content-Type is application/json, or an SSE stream when Content-Type is text/event-stream.

schema.description: SSE stream. Each event has the form 'data: {"delta": "<word> "}'. The stream ends with 'data: [DONE]'.
